raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> ; I made a purchase of {$660.00} with a company called " XXXX '' using my Barclaycard Master 's Card to make the purchase. This company goes by the name of " XXXX XXXX '' in public. I originally found them on XXXX because they were advertising their services to people like me who are interested in making money through the XXXXXXXX XXXX. They claim that they can pass a XXXX XXXX XXXX  challenge for you and that " you will get a payout or your money back guaranteed. '' Yes, they passed the prop firm challenge for me as advertised with the prop firm of THEIR CHOOSING. They automatically chose a prop firm called " XXXX XXXX '' to pass the challenge with. XXXX then paid XXXX XXXX {$500.00} for the attempt at passing their prop firm challenge. They passed their challenge and XXXX XXXX quickly reimbursed XXXX the {$500.00} back for their winnings. ( See how this money just came right back to them. ) I was then allowed to trade on their platform. I quickly made about {$5000.00} in profits with XXXX XXXX after 21 days of trading with them myself. However, they never paid me the {$5000.00} that I had made in trading profits. Long story short ... XXXX is a SCAM COMPANY who is in league with XXXX XXXX to make quick profits from people and never give them their money back no matter how much I ask for it unfortunately. Please help me recover my {$660.00} back from Barclays Mastercard because I've already asked for a refund from the XXXX  company ( or " XXXX XXXX '' as they are publicly called ) and they won't refund me the money they owe me. The Barclaycard Disputing Department has already been through the disputing process and couldn't find enough " evidence '' to support my claims. ( Although they never even asked for additional evidence from me at all. Which they definitely should have done to begin with. ) Please help me get the justice I deserve from these nasty thieves and robbers! Thanks a million!
